steps.t: Anyâmat thinks it would be a great idea to pick fights with random freebooters so that she might experience the rough and tumble life of a sailor. Wil…
The first freebooter you spoke to isn't interested in fighting. Try challenging one of her friends. Freebooters may be found on a tiny island north-we…
The second freebooter you spoke to wasn't interested in fighting. Anyâmat has decided to change strategies and wants to make friends with these freebo…
Anyâmat wants to make friends with all four freebooters on this little island. Freebooters may be found on a tiny island north-west of Halrax.
